content.content: Actress known for her roles in El Contrato (2009) and If I Close My Eyes Now (2018). Her Instagram account, aalexandreamartins, offers an engaging mix of personal and professional photos. She has attracted 160,000 followers with her varied and thoughtful content. She wanted to be an actress from the age of 12 but went to school to study law. She practices Pilates and weight-lifting. In 2016, she married Brazilian actor and playwrightAntônio Fagundes. She co-starred withPedro Limain the film El Contrato.
